message:
feat(api): add OpenAPI schema generation and comprehensive contract tests

Implements OpenAPI spec generation infrastructure and extensive contract
test coverage for API response validation.

OpenAPI Generation (apps/gateway/src/api/):
- generate-openapi.ts: Generates OpenAPI 3.0 spec from route definitions
- schemas.ts: Zod schemas for all API response types
  - System endpoints (health, version, capabilities)
  - Sessions and agents
  - Jobs API
  - Safety posture
  - Dashboard and widgets

Contract Tests (packages/flywheel-clients):
- Comprehensive contract.test.ts validating:
  - Response envelope structure
  - Required fields presence
  - Type correctness
  - Error response format
- Covers all major API endpoints

This enables automated validation that client expectations match server
responses, catching breaking changes early in the development cycle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
